nodes.html:
Sustainable collaboration

  • We collaborate on an equal footing, regardless of whether you are a partner, customer or employee
  • We develop ideas further together
  • We enjoy our craft

Sustainable companionship

  • We take care of our fellow human beings and our environment
  • We learn something new every day and pass on our knowledge

Sustainable software development

  • We find elegant solutions for complex tasks
  • We are interested in fresh technologies
  • We love software development
